productDisplayName: Little Miss Intimates Pink & Black Pyjama Set
description: Style NoteWe love this cute pyjama set from little miss intimates which has a girly vibe and keeps you feeling young. Bright colours with cartoon prints, immensely comfortable and super soft fabric makes this just what you want to go to to sleep in or spend a day lounging at home. Product DetailsBright pink spaghetti top with black printed binding at the armholes and black printed straps, round neckline, graphic print of little miss Princess in front in shiny silver. White and black printed shorts with an elasticated waistband and is tag-less.Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dry or iron on print
